import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    def find_object(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # Current state
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_count_s = find_object(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, sq_count_s = find_object(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    agent_y_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    # Next state
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_count_n = find_object(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, sq_count_n = find_object(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    agent_y_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    holding_n_f = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s_f = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32)
    not_holding_n_f = 1.0 - holding_n_f

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # --- Phase 1: Not holding, approach pyramid ---
    dist_to_pyr_s = jnp.abs(agent_y_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(agent_x_s - pyr_x_s)
    dist_to_pyr_n = jnp.abs(agent_y_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(agent_x_n - pyr_x_n)
    # Reward for getting closer to pyramid when not holding
    approach_pyr = (dist_to_pyr_s - dist_to_pyr_n) / max_dist
    approach_pyr_reward = (1.0 - holding_s_f) * (1.0 - holding_n_f) * approach_pyr

    # --- Pickup bonus ---
    just_picked_up = (1.0 - holding_s_f) * holding_n_f
    pickup_bonus = just_picked_up * 1.0

    # --- Phase 2: Holding, approach square ---
    dist_to_sq_s = jnp.abs(agent_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(agent_x_s - sq_x_s)
    dist_to_sq_n = jnp.abs(agent_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(agent_x_n - sq_x_n)
    approach_sq = (dist_to_sq_s - dist_to_sq_n) / max_dist
    approach_sq_reward = holding_s_f * holding_n_f * approach_sq

    # --- Phase 3: Place pyramid adjacent to square ---
    dist_pyr_to_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_pyr_to_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)

    # Success: pyramid on grid, adjacent to square (dist == 1)
    pyramid_on_grid_n = pyr_count_n > 0.5
    adjacent_n = (dist_pyr_to_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_to_sq_n <= 1.5) & pyramid_on_grid_n
    success_reward = adjacent_n.astype(jnp.float32) * 5.0

    # Putdown bonus: reward improvement in pyramid-to-square distance when putdown happens
    just_put_down = holding_s_f * (1.0 - holding_n_f)
    # When pyramid is placed, reward based on how close it is to square
    pyr_sq_proximity_n = jnp.where(
        pyramid_on_grid_n,
        (max_dist - dist_pyr_to_sq_n) / max_dist,
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )
    putdown_reward = just_put_down * pyr_sq_proximity_n * 2.0

    # Dense proximity reward: when pyramid is on grid (not held), reward closeness to square
    # This helps the agent understand the goal even before success
    pyr_on_grid_not_held_n = pyramid_on_grid_n & (~holding_n)
    pyr_sq_dist_improvement = (dist_pyr_to_sq_s - dist_pyr_to_sq_n) / max_dist
    # Only reward this when pyramid was already placed (not just put down this step)
    pyr_placed_both = (~holding_s) & (~holding_n) & (pyr_count_s > 0.5) & pyramid_on_grid_n
    placement_improvement = pyr_placed_both.astype(jnp.float32) * pyr_sq_dist_improvement * 2.0

    total_reward = (
        approach_pyr_reward * 0.5
        + pickup_bonus
        + approach_sq_reward * 0.5
        + putdown_reward
        + success_reward
        + placement_improvement
    )

    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
